faq.question: What is the best cold brew ratio?
faq.answer: For concentrate (diluted before drinking): 1:5 coffee to water. For ready-to-drink: 1:8. Use coarsely ground coffee and steep 12-24 hours in the fridge.

faq.question: Is the Cold Brew Coffee Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What water should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate water value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

faq.question: Can I use this calculator on my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, the Cold Brew Coffee Calculator is fully responsive and works on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop. No app download needed.

sections.title: What Is the Cold Brew Coffee Calculator?
sections.body: The Cold Brew Coffee Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your water, type, you get instant results including coffee, coffee, coffee. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.body: Getting coffee right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct.
